name: Cosmic Bloom
author: Stardust
description: Vibrant violet & magenta nebula clouds over deep space.
preview: radial-gradient(120% 100% at 30% 0%, #c061ff, transparent 60%), radial-gradient(120% 100% at 90% 30%, #5a1b80, transparent 60%), #07040f

name: Neon Drive
author: Stardust
description: Retro-futuristic synthwave: magenta + cyan glow over indigo.

theme.css: ytmusic-nav-bar.ytmusic-app-layout { box-shadow: 0 1px 0 0 color-mix(in srgb, var(--stardust-accent) 40%, transparent), 0 0 22px color-mix(in srgb, var(--stardust-accent) 25%, transparent) !important; }

name: Deep Void
author: Stardust
description: Sleek near-black minimalism with a faint periwinkle glow.

name: Emerald Nebula
author: Stardust
description: Teal-green cosmic haze with mint stars.

name: Orbitron
author: Google Fonts
description: Geometric sci-fi display font — full UI.

font.css: @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Orbitron:wght@400;500;700;900&display=swap'); ytmusic-app, ytmusic-app yt-formatted-string, ytmusic-app .title, ytmusic-app span, ytmusic-app a, ytmusic-app div, ytmusic-app button, ytmusic-app input { font-family: 'Orbitron', system-ui, sans-serif !important; }

name: Inter
author: Google Fonts
description: Crisp, modern neutral sans — easy on the eyes.

font.css: @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Inter:wght@400;500;600;700&display=swap'); ytmusic-app, ytmusic-app yt-formatted-string, ytmusic-app .title, ytmusic-app span, ytmusic-app a, ytmusic-app div, ytmusic-app button, ytmusic-app input { font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif !important; }

name: Comfortaa
author: Google Fonts
description: Soft, rounded, friendly geometric font.

font.css: @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Comfortaa:wght@400;500;700&display=swap'); ytmusic-app, ytmusic-app yt-formatted-string, ytmusic-app .title, ytmusic-app span, ytmusic-app a, ytmusic-app div, ytmusic-app button, ytmusic-app input { font-family: 'Comfortaa', system-ui, sans-serif !important; }

name: JetBrains Mono
author: Google Fonts
description: Monospaced terminal vibes for the whole UI.

font.css: @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=JetBrains+Mono:wght@400;500;700&display=swap'); ytmusic-app, ytmusic-app yt-formatted-string, ytmusic-app .title, ytmusic-app span, ytmusic-app a, ytmusic-app div, ytmusic-app button, ytmusic-app input { font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', ui-monospace, monospace !important; }

name: Vinyl Spin
author: Stardust
description: The now-playing artwork becomes a spinning vinyl record (bar + full player).

name: Gradient Headings
author: Stardust
description: Section titles shimmer with an animated accent gradient.
css: .ytmusic-carousel-shelf-basic-header-renderer .text, ytmusic-carousel-shelf-basic-header-renderer yt-formatted-string, ytmusic-shelf-renderer > .title, .title.ytmusic-immersive-header-renderer { background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--stardust-accent), #ffffff, var(--stardust-accent)); background-size: 200% auto; -webkit-background-clip: text; background-clip: text; -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent; animation: stardustGrad 6s linear infinite; } @keyframes stardustGrad { to { background-position: 200% center; } }

name: Card Lift
author: Stardust
description: Cards lift and glow with your accent on hover.
css: ytmusic-two-row-item-renderer, ytmusic-responsive-list-item-renderer { transition: transform .2s cubic-bezier(.2,.9,.3,1.3), box-shadow .2s ease; } ytmusic-two-row-item-renderer:hover { transform: translateY(-6px) scale(1.02); box-shadow: 0 14px 34px color-mix(in srgb, var(--stardust-accent) 45%, transparent); border-radius: 14px; }

name: Pulse Play
author: Stardust
description: The play/pause button breathes with a soft accent halo.
css: #play-pause-button { border-radius: 50% !important; animation: stardustPulse 2.4s ease-in-out infinite; } @keyframes stardustPulse { 0%,100% { box-shadow: 0 0 0 0 color-mix(in srgb, var(--stardust-accent) 55%, transparent); } 50% { box-shadow: 0 0 0 10px transparent; } }

name: Rounded Everything
author: Stardust
description: Softly rounds all artwork and thumbnails.
css: ytmusic-thumbnail-renderer, ytmusic-thumbnail-renderer img, img.ytmusic-thumbnail-renderer, yt-img-shadow img { border-radius: 16px !important; overflow: hidden; }

name: Compact Density
author: Stardust
description: Tightens list/row spacing to fit more on screen.
css: ytmusic-responsive-list-item-renderer { padding-top: 2px !important; padding-bottom: 2px !important; } ytmusic-shelf-renderer #contents.ytmusic-shelf-renderer { gap: 2px !important; } ytmusic-carousel { --ytmusic-carousel-items-per-row: 7; }

name: Hide Upgrade
author: Stardust
description: Removes the Premium 'Upgrade' entries from the UI.

name: Focus Dim
author: Stardust
description: Dims other cards in a row when you hover one.
css: ytmusic-carousel:hover ytmusic-two-row-item-renderer:not(:hover) { opacity: .45; transition: opacity .25s ease; }

name: Bass Boost
author: Stardust
description: Punchy low-end lift via a low-shelf EQ on the live audio.

name: Treble Boost
author: Stardust
description: Crisp, airy highs via a high-shelf EQ.

name: Volume Boost
author: Stardust
description: Extra loudness beyond 100% with make-up gain.

name: 8D Audio
author: Stardust
description: The sound pans slowly around your head. Best on headphones.
preview: radial-gradient(circle at 28% 50%, #8b5cff, transparent 55%), radial-gradient(circle at 72% 50%, #2be0ff, transparent 55%), #0a0720

name: Nightcore
author: Stardust
description: Speeds playback up (~1.2x) for a brighter, faster feel.

name: Slowed + Reverb
author: Stardust
description: Slows playback (~0.85x) with a dreamy reverb tail.

name: Synced Lyrics
author: Stardust
description: Time-synced, auto-scrolling lyrics fetched from LRCLIB.

name: Sleep Timer
author: Stardust
description: Auto-pause after 15/30/60 min — a floating countdown pill.

name: Scroll to Top
author: Stardust
description: A floating button to jump back to the top of any page.

name: Ambient Glow
author: Stardust
description: Tints the backdrop with the current album-art colour.

name: Quick Actions Bar
author: Stardust
description: A floating bar: like, dislike, shuffle, copy song link, save to playlist.

name: Auto-DJ
author: Stardust
description: Keeps the music going — enables autoplay/radio as the queue runs out.

name: Reactive Theming
author: Stardust
description: Tints the accent, visualizer and black hole to match each song's album art.
preview: radial-gradient(circle at 30% 20%, #ff2bd6, transparent 55%), radial-gradient(circle at 80% 80%, #2be0ff, transparent 55%), #0a0a18

name: Crossfade
author: Stardust
description: Fades tracks in and out like a DJ — and with the energy profile analysed, it detects dead outros and mixes straight into the next song.

name: Smart Playlist Tools
author: Stardust
description: Floating shortcuts: start radio, go to artist/album, play random, save queue.

name: Karaoke Mode
author: Stardust
description: Cancels the center-channel vocals so you can sing them yourself — pairs perfectly with Synced Lyrics. Works best on stereo mixes.
preview: radial-gradient(circle at 50% 30%, #ffd23f, transparent 55%), radial-gradient(circle at 50% 90%, #8b5cff, transparent 60%), #120a1a

name: Prism Accent
author: Stardust
description: Your accent colour slowly drifts through the whole spectrum — every glow, button and slider cycles with it.

name: Solar Flare
author: Stardust
description: Molten gold and ember orange erupting over a charred sky.
preview: radial-gradient(120% 100% at 50% 110%, #ff8c1a, transparent 62%), radial-gradient(90% 70% at 20% 0%, #5c1a02, transparent 60%), #0a0402

name: Vinyl
author: Stardust
description: Warm rolled-off highs and a soft crackle bed — every song sounds like it spins on a turntable.

name: Instrumental Focus
author: Stardust
description: Work mode: listens for vocals and auto-skips sung tracks, leaving instrumentals. Replay a skipped song to keep it.

name: Song X-Ray
author: Stardust
description: Paints the song's anatomy over the seekbar — see the quiet verses and loud choruses, click to jump, or hit ⏩ chorus.

name: AI DJ
author: Stardust
description: A radio host between songs — one spoken line every few tracks, written from YOUR listening stats and voiced with TTS while the music ducks. Needs a Groq key.

name: Voice Control
author: Stardust
description: Click the mic and say it: pause, skip, or "play something mellow from the 80s" — speech to intent to playback. Needs a Groq key.

name: Listen Together
author: Stardust
description: Synced listening rooms — share a code, playback follows the host to the second, everyone's word-synced lyrics light up together. With chat.

name: World Ticker
author: Stardust
description: A soft pill that cycles what other Stardust listeners are playing right now. Fully anonymous — titles only, nothing stored.

name: Lyric Quiz
author: Stardust
description: 🎯 mutes the next line — type it from memory and get graded. Scores share to your Listen Together room.

name: Room Lights
author: Stardust
description: Your real lights pulse with the beat in the track's colour — WLED, Govee (LAN), Philips Hue and Nanoleaf. Set the device IP in the panel → Lights.

name: Rhythm Game
author: Stardust
description: 🎮 turns any word-synced song into a tap game — notes fall on the vocals, SPACE to hit, combos multiply, high scores stick per song.

name: Karaoke Night
author: Stardust
description: 🎤✨ fullscreen sing-along: vocals cancelled, giant word-fill lyrics over your theme, and the mic can grade how on-the-words you are.

name: Phone Remote
author: Stardust
description: 📱 your phone becomes a remote AND a second-screen lyrics display — open one LAN address, no app. Party mode: laptop on the TV, words on every phone.

name: Lyric Learn
author: Stardust
description: Right-click any word as it's sung → translation, reading and its meaning in the line. Every lookup joins your 📚 flashcard deck. Needs a Groq key.

name: Release Radar
author: Stardust
description: Watches your top artists for fresh albums and singles and announces each drop once. Quietly checks every 6 hours.

name: Normalize
author: Stardust
description: Every song at the same perceived volume — quiet 70s masters come up, loud modern ones come down. Measured from the track's own audio.

name: Intro Skip
author: Stardust
description: Long ambient intro? It finds where the song actually starts and jumps you there.

name: Skip Learning
author: Stardust
description: Notices the songs you always skip and starts skipping them for you. Replay one to un-teach it.

name: Energy Dial
author: Stardust
description: ⚡ keep / chill / rise — autoplay tracks that fight the vibe you set get skipped, measured from the actual audio.

name: AI Playlist
author: Stardust
description: 📝 describe it — "45 minutes for a night drive, heavier back half" — and it builds and drives the whole session from your library.

name: TV Mode
author: Stardust
description: 📺 the jukebox idle screen — big art, clock, live lyric line. For when the laptop is plugged into the TV.

name: DJ's Booth
author: Stardust
description: 🎧 replaces YTM's Up Next entirely — the DJ hand-picks every next song from your favorites, lost tracks and fitting discoveries, tells you why, and takes a veto (click the pill).

name: Night Mode
author: Stardust
description: 🌙 after 10 PM the volume eases down automatically and comes back in the morning — no more midnight blasts.
